titleStmt.title: SII 7.324: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 324. (A.R. No. 134 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB LYING IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ [.] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svasti . jayādbhudaya
ḍasaṁda saṁvatsa naśakavaruṣa 1324 saṁ
citrabhānusaṁvatsarada caItra śu 5 gu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirā
ra śrīvīrapratāpa hariharamahārāyara vijayarājyābhyu
ma(ṁ)nma hāpradhānaṁ basavaṁṇaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava pati
ḷahāravatsāhasāhuvinavara makkaḷu malladēvasāhuvina makaḷu
makkaḷu narasiṁha ṭhakkuraru mūḻukēriya saumyadēvara saṁnidhiyalu
ḻuhāḍiya baṁcaṁṇaheggaḍeya kayalu koṭa mūlava koṁḍu
ṁḍikadokkalu kāhu mēhu holanela modalāda
nu Ā ṭhakuraru tsatrakke dhārāpūrvakavāgi Eṟadu koṭṭaru.A bāḷacatu
mūḍalu Āneguṁḍiya mūḍakareIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu Ottina hara
riṁdaṁ mūḍalu kuṁbaraḍiya guḍḍeIṁdaṁ teṁkalu dāsakeṟeyara bāḷiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu Iṁtī catusīmeya holanelanoḷaguḷḷabāḷina vivara bayalaguṁḍiya gaddehara
nāgaṁḍugada mū 3 Ā gaddeya keḷagaṇa kaṁbaḷagadde bittuva bede nā mū Alliṁdaṁ
ḍiya kaṭṭina gadde bittuva bede nā mu 6 Āgaddeya mēlaṇa tiṭṭehoḷa bittu
gaṁḍuga mū 2 Aṁtu bayalu bittuva bede nāmu 21 Adaṟa catussī meviva
ra gadeya gaḍiIdaṁ paḍuvalu Āriyabaḷiya mārakaveyadēvaru naṁdana
ḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu dēvarānaṁda mārakavena jhājenagaddeIṁdaṁ baḍagalu kōṭenā
thadēvara dēvasvada kalukūrakkaḷa bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu baḍagiya bayalagadde bittuva bedegaṇa
gilu nāgaṁ mū 6 ṟa catussīme mūḍalu basavaṁtana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu basavaṁtana bāḷi
ṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu basavaṁtana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu kōṭināthadēvara dēvasvada kalukū
rabāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu kūḍalagareya bayalu bittuva bedenārmūṟa catussīme mūḍalu ho
ṁdaṁ paḍuvalu basavaṁtana gadde Iṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu dē
vara baḷiyavara bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu heṁmakkiyoḷagetoṁtāragaddebayalu bittuva be
de nāgaṁ mū 4 ṟa catussīme mūḍalu baḷḷābaḷiya kōṭīsaradahana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
[Ā] kōṭīsaradahana bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu kōṭīsaradahana makkiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu
baccaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu vodavina bayilagadde bittuva bede nāgaṁ mū 4 Ā haḍaṇa makki nā
gaṁ mū 1 Īpedaṟe catussīme mūḍalu dēvaru naṁdamārukkavena gaddeIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
Aṁṇana janabāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu gōIṁdana beṭṭiṁdaṁ baḍagalu harida baccaliṁda
ṁ teṁkalu hittilanaḍuva gadde 1 kke bittuva bedenā mū 1 ṟa gaḍi paḍuvalu gōIṁdana beṭṭiṁ
mūḍalu teṁkalu beṁmaṇakerenaleṟaguḍeya gaddeIṁ baḍagalu mogavaṇacakyāra
gadeIṁdaṁ teṁkalu koḷakeya bayaloḷage baḷigade bittōdu nāgaṁḍugada mū 2 ṟa catussī
me mūḍalu taṁmiseṭṭiya gaddeIṁ paḍuvalu kallagaddeIṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu Aṁṇappa
na makkiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu Aṁṇakulukūrana bāḷiṁ teṁkalu keṟeya gadde bittuva bede nā mū
3 catussīme mūḍalu kallagaddeIṁ paḍuvalu mōḷina baḷigaddeIṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu harida ba
ccaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu tuṇikana mōḷiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iḷuveyala hāḷi 3 kaṁ bittuva bede nā
mū 3 ṟa gade mūḍalu maṁḍalabhaṁḍāriya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu nabāḷiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu teṁka bāceriyaṇa bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu bacaliṁdaṁ yoḷagaṇa
koḷakeya bayalu bittuva bede nā mū 5 ṟa gaḍi mūḍalu
kulukūrana bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu harvvatiya bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu keṟeIṁ
daṁ teṁkalu teṁkabayalu bittuva bede nāgaṁ mū 9 ṟa gaḍi mūḍalu maṁḍalabhaṁḍā
riya gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu heggaḍeya khaṁḍikada gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu petti
da Agaḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu gūjagekoṭṭa bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu teṟeruḍeya bayalu bi
ttuva bede nāgaṁ mū 2 . Adaṟa kūḍaṇa makki bittuva bede nāgaṁ mū 5 he
ggaḍeya mane maneṭhāU maneya bāgilagadde mattagadde Alliṁdaṁ mēleṇa
harahina makki saha bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁ mū 21 Adaṟa catu
ssīme mūḍalu maṁḍalabhaṁḍāriya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu braṁhmarā
la paḍuvalu beṁmaṇanāyakana gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu Ettida
Agaḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu hājegana bayaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu Ā makkiya kū
ḍaṇa makki bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugada mū 15 Aṁtu bayalu bittuva
bedegaṇagalu nāgaṁḍugada mū 69 . makki bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁ
ḍugada mūḍe 41 Ubhayaṁ bayalu makki bittuva bede nāgaṁḍu
gada mūḍe 110 .
Digital edition of SII 7.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
